entities.name: 基于观点的决策 (opinion-based decision)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:在做世界没见过的新产品(1.0版本)时必须依赖的决策方式,因为缺乏类比数据,必须靠经验、品味和直觉(有根据的直觉)来做定夺。

evidence.quote: So this was a classic, like I say in Build, data versus opinion-based decision.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And so you have to be very articulate about how... what that opinion-based decision is made for, why, how it might affect market, how you do it, and make sure the team understands it.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And I saw this so many times at all these major corporations, so they're just kind of covering their with bullshit data and not really doing the hard work of saying, "I'm going to make this decision and we are going to select this, and yes, I might be wrong or we as the opinion based decision makers are wrong and we will correct it later and we'll take the heat for that."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: But then you can delegate other things, but certain pieces of it you really need to... And when I mean micromanage, it means micromanage the decision, not necessarily the operations of doing it, making sure you're getting the data like we did with the keyboard on the iPhone to make sure we're getting the right data to help us get the informed gut to make that opinion-based decision.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: But that was the crazy opinion-based decision was, okay, yes, it's going to cost 249, but it's going to save you 800 to $1,200 a year.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And that was a real opinion-based decision.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: Steve was the hub and he was in each of them putting them together, like I said, the opinion-based decision maker.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

entities.name: Humane
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:试图用激光在手掌上投影取代手机屏幕的 AI 硬件公司,被批评为只是不同而非更好。

entities.name: ARM
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:由嘉宾同事 Hermann Hauser 参与创立、如今在移动设备中占据统治地位的处理器架构,初代 iPod 正是借助其低功耗特性诞生。

evidence.quote: And then he created with his team the ARM processor.

evidence.quote: And so he was one of... one of the founders of ARM.

evidence.quote: So it was new battery technology, new mass storage, portable mass storage and this new generation of digital music and we had ARM processors.

entities.name: vibe code
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:完全靠自然语言提示让 AI 生成完整代码的开发方式,可以用来做玩具原型,但无法用来构建像 Flighty 这样底层的奢侈品级创新软件。

evidence.quote: Now, do you think you could vibe code Flighty?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: If we look now, going on, people are like, if you're a SaaS company or if you're a software only company, your software companies' worthless because anyone can vibe code it into the thing.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0
